Train the decoder from random initialization on the packed corpus; single-GPU now, multi-GPU ready.
Stage three. The from-scratch decoder learns next-token prediction on the packed corpus with a cosine schedule, gradient accumulation, mixed precision, and checkpointing.

Pretraining is the core language-competence step. It runs on a single L40S by default and supports distributed data parallel for multi-GPU scaling. It tracks validation loss, saves best and last checkpoints, and resumes from the last checkpoint. Effective batch size, schedule, and model preset are configurable.
